results.title: Centre asks States to complete fire safety audits of all hospitals by July 31
results.description: The Union Ministry of Health and Family Welfare has directed all States and Union Territories to complete fire safety audits of all public and private healthcare facilities through a special drive and upload the findings on the Integrated Health Information Platform (IHIP) by July 31

results.title: 'Actual bodily harm' arrest after police called to concern for person
results.description: An investigation has been launched after a man was arrested following reports of concern for a person on Robingoodfellows Lane in March.

results.title: Chino Hills mandir celebrates America’s semiquincentennial anniversary
results.description: “Desi Roots, American Dreams” is a free two-day community celebration to honor America’s 250th anniversary, today through Saturday, July 4.

results.title: Police Arrested the Teen Who Was Knocked Down While His Attackers Fled — the Video Has X Demanding Answers
results.description: Birmingham police arrested an allegedly drunk teen who was amid a fight with three other teenagers. The incident has sparked outrage on the internet with many demanding answers and accountability. According to video footage shared by @Re_mi_gra_tion on X, four teenagers were seen having an argument while bystanders watched the situation unfold. One of the four, wearing a white T-shirt, was described in the post as allegedly drunk. The boy in the white t-shirt was seen backing away as the three other teens began slowly closing in on him. Initially, they appeared to be having a calm conversation until the...

results.title: Welsh Tap and Go system that risks overcharging rail passengers faces challenge
results.description: Flintshire County Council will demand greater clarity for passengers from Transport for Wales after it was revealed its new 'Tap and go' system charges every passenger as an adult.
